ex_lb: Si wunnt an enger klenger Wunneng.
ex_en: She lives in a small apartment.
We watch TV in the living room.
The shoes are in the hallway.
Old things are in the attic.
The wine is in the cellar.
The children play in the garden.
The car is in the garage.

ex_lb: Eng Auer hänkt un der Wand.
ex_en: A clock hangs on the wall.
The light hangs on the ceiling.
We live on the first floor.
The furniture is made of wood.
The food is on the table.
The plates are in the cupboard.

ex_lb: Ech kucke mech am Spigel un.
ex_en: I look at myself in the mirror.
The flooring is made of wood.
I drink a cup of coffee.
I want a glass of water.
The soup is in the bowl.
I eat the soup with the spoon.
The fork lies next to the plate.

ex_lb: Ech bake Eeër an der Patell.
ex_en: I fry eggs in the pan.
The soup boils in the pot.
The milk is in the fridge.
The cake is in the oven.
The clock hangs on the wall.
Put the food in the container.
The basket is full of fruit.
The toys are in the box.
I comb my hair with the comb.

ex_lb: Ech schloen den Nol mam Hummer.
ex_en: I hit the nail with the hammer.

ex_lb: Den Nol ass an der Wand.
ex_en: The nail is in the wall.

ex_lb: Ech stinn um siwen Auer op.
ex_en: I get up at seven o'clock.
I wash myself in the morning.

ex_lb: Ech wäschen no dem Iessen of.
ex_en: I wash up after the meal.
Lay the book on the table!
Set the cup on the table!
Put the bottle in the fridge!

ex_lb: Ech rou mech op dem Canapé aus.

ex_en: In the morning I drink coffee.
In the evening I like to read.
At noon we eat at home.
The milk is in the fridge.
I buy a loaf of bread.
I drink a lot of water.
The picture hangs on the wall.
The lamp is in the corner.

ex_lb: De Schlëssel ass an der Tasch.
ex_en: The key is in the pocket.
We eat in the dining room.

ex_lb: Ech ginn um zéng an d'Bett.
ex_en: I go to bed at ten.
There is dust on the cupboard.
In the evening I like to read.
The mail is in the mailbox.
The book lies on the table.
The picture hangs on the wall.
The sun shines into the window.
The toys are on the floor.
The socks are in the chest of drawers.
The table is made of wood.
The bowl is made of plastic.
I heat the food in the microwave.
The flowers are in the vase.
